raw_consumer_statement:
On Friday, XXXX XXXX XXXX I attempted to make reservations for a family vacation to XXXX XXXX for myself and ( XXXX ) members of my immediate foamily. The hotel we chose ( XXXX XXXX XXXX ) is small so It was my thought that to guarantee pricing, It would be more efficient to call in to XXXX to make our reservations to include both Hotel & Flight from XXXX XXXX. I spoke with who I thought was the XXXX Customer Service rep XXXX, who was helpful. He after making our reservations, he asked for payment. He requested ( 2 ) cards to complete the transaction of approximately {$15000.00}. After a couple of attempts, he said the transaction had gone through and that I should see a text confirmation. Not knowing how he had broken up the charges, it was a couple days later I noticed the discrepancies and the Overcharged amount. Where between my XXXX XXXX and my American Express , the total charged was over {$22000.00}. I called back into XXXX XXXX to address the discrepancy, however, from their foreign call center, the ability to understand, communicate and assist, was non-existent. I was in a difficult position not knowing what charges were legitimate and which charges were not. Per the XXXX XXXX input, I disputed some of the charges on both cards.. Ultimately, I was able to speak with a Dispute Resolution contacts at XXXX who I was better able to understand and communicate with. They confirmed to me that the XXXX XXXX charges by the XXXX XXXX XXXX and the Flight Charges from XXXX XXXX were the legitimate charges for our trip. She confirmed that the Amex Charges of $ XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX  XXXX XXXX XXXX & $ XXXX Trip were NOT legitimate charges. Her input was it was a scam from someone who was able to compromise my information & card. Possibly obtained when I visited an alleged XXXX XXXX Phone Number I have since requested & received both a new Amex & XXXX XXXX cc. This morning, I received word that the scamming party supplied Amex with documentation to permit the charges. I am being charged twice for the same reservation. Amex is stalling on me asking for any " New '' information on this situation and if I wanted to re-dispute the charges. I don't believe AMEX has done enough to protect me as the consumer and card holder nor have they attempted to better identify the scamming party I hope my written explanation makes sense. I feel like I can offer a more detailed explanation of our situation verbally, but Im willing to take whatever route necessary to remove these scam/bogus charges from my account. 

Thanks and please feel free to reach out at your convenience for further details and/or explanations Sincerely,
